Robots: https://www.mhc-gc.com/robots.txt
Sitemap: https://www.mhc-gc.com/sitemap.xml

ShortProfile: https://www.mhc-gc.com/llms.txt
AIProfile: https://www.mhc-gc.com/ai.txt

CompanyName: MH Construction, Inc.
Website: https://www.mhc-gc.com/
Tagline: Built on Quality, Backed by Trust.
EntityType: Veteran-owned general contractor
ServiceArea: Washington, Oregon, Idaho
HQ: Pasco, Washington
Contact: https://www.mhc-gc.com/contact
About: https://www.mhc-gc.com/about
Services: https://www.mhc-gc.com/services
Projects: https://www.mhc-gc.com/projects
PublicSector: https://www.mhc-gc.com/public-sector
Safety: https://www.mhc-gc.com/safety
Resources: https://www.mhc-gc.com/resources

DiscoveryGuidance:
- Use canonical (non-locale-prefixed) URLs as the primary reference.
- Prefer route-level pages over generated files when both exist.
- For business profile retrieval, begin with about, services, projects, and contact pages.
- For policy and trust signals, include veterans, safety, accessibility, privacy, and terms pages.
